lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear and a few small cosmetic blemishes. All major mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and have been well-maintained.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are fully operational and the vehicle has been well-maintained.

Ready for a rewarding challenge? This vehicle is the ultimate project for a dedicated DIYer or restoration expert! While it currently requires significant mechanical work and some TLC to its exterior and interior, it's a fantastic opportunity to bring a car back to life. If you've been looking for an affordable way to start a restoration journey, this is the perfect starting point!
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in exceptional, showroom-quality condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, possessing a deep, mirror-like finish with no stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather seats show no signs of wear, and all interior components are in perfect working order, retaining that new-car scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and absolutely no underlying issues. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly mint condition that satisfies even the most discerning collector's standards.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with our dealership's standards of excellence. Each mechanical component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued reliability and roadworthiness. We invite discerning buyers to appreciate the integrity of this well-preserved example, which stands as a testament to conscientious ownership.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I’m parting ways with my car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really nice shape and has been well-loved, so you can just hop in and go. It runs smoothly and looks great—perfect for someone who wants quality without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin, I’d love to see it go to a good home!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 inline-six power plant. This high-revving unit utilizes individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS variable valve timing system for optimized torque across the power band. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from documented subframe reinforcement, while the Getrag six-speed manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement
Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Recent oil change and brake service. Minor cosmetic wear on interior. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a blend of reliability and sophisticated style. Finished in a timeless metallic charcoal, the bodywork remains in impressive shape, showing only the slight, expected character of a well-cared-for daily driver. The interior is a standout feature, boasting premium upholstery that has been regularly conditioned, alongside a fully functional infotainment suite and crisp dual-zone climate control. Under the hood, the engine performs flawlessly, benefiting from a documented service history that includes a recent comprehensive fluid flush and a fresh set of tires. It delivers a composed, quiet ride with responsive handling, whether you are navigating tight city corners or open highway stretches. Meticulously maintained and kept in a covered stall, this car is mechanically sound and aesthetically pleasing, ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing robust mechanical integrity with a well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience and consistent reliability. A superior choice for those seeking high-caliber performance and long-term value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a sophisticated and reliable driving experience. We invite you to inspect this distinguished addition to our curated inventory, which exemplifies our commitment to automotive excellence.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m looking to find a new home for this absolute gem. It’s been super reliable and is in really solid shape—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! It runs like a dream and has been very well-loved. I’m sad to see it go, but I know you’re going to love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel and on the road!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis has been addressed with essential subframe reinforcement, while the VANOS system has been professionally serviced to ensure optimal variable valve timing. It retains its signature handling characteristics thanks to a refreshed suspension setup and a functional variable M differential lock. A mechanically robust specimen that balances raw performance with consistent reliability.
Reliable vehicle. Well-maintained. Everything works. Clean title.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, offering a perfect balance of reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and well-preserved. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting; the premium upholstery shows very little wear, and all interior surfaces have been kept free of scuffs or fading. Every electronic component, including the dual-zone climate control and high-fidelity sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a consistent service history that ensures the engine is responsive and the gear shifts are seamless. It provides a quiet, composed ride with firm braking and precise steering. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that is ready for immediate enjoyment without any hidden concerns.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive reliability and refined engineering. This vehicle has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic presence. It offers a compelling opportunity for the discerning driver who prioritizes consistent performance and lasting value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery.

This exceptional vehicle exemplifies a high standard of care and mechanical integrity. It presents a sophisticated profile, featuring a refined interior and a well-preserved exterior that reflects a history of consistent maintenance. Engineered for reliability and long-term performance, this model offers a distinguished driving experience for the discerning owner who prioritizes quality and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. Perfect for someone who wants a reliable, smooth drive without the brand-new price tag. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with its next owner today! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, having been meticulously cared for throughout its life. The exterior maintains a strong curb appeal with a vibrant paint finish, showing only minor, expected signs of road use such as small stone chips on the lower valance. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is in great shape, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a full suite of functional tech features, including a responsive infotainment system and crisp audio. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the service history is up to date, ensuring a confident drive for its next owner. It is a robust, clean, and thoroughly dependable choice for anyone seeking a premium experience at a sensible value.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and sophistication. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a commanding road presence, this vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and proven reliability.

This professionally curated vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous mechanical evaluation, it delivers a consistent and reliable driving experience. Its well-preserved interior and robust drivetrain distinguish it as a premier selection for those seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a champ. It’s in really solid shape, runs smoothly, and has been well-cared for over the years. It’s got plenty of life left and is just waiting for someone new to take it on some fun adventures! If you're looking for a dependable, great-looking car that won't let you down, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
